Here is a poem that captures the dance of time and memory, woven with care and thoughtfulness.

In the flow of time, memories bloom,
Petals of moments, unfurling in gloom.
Silent echoes of laughter and tears,
Dancing with shadows of forgotten years.
Time, the painter, brushes with grace,
Each stroke a memory etched on the face.
In the vast gallery, they quietly stand,
Whispering tales of the heart's command.
Like stars that twinkle in the night's embrace,
Memories linger, in time's gentle trace.
As a poet, I find great joy in weaving the delicate threads of time and memory into a tapestry of words.
